title: MD
biography: Michael DeBakey was a Lebanese-American cardiovascular surgeon who pioneered numerous cardiac procedures including coronary artery bypass grafting, carotid endarterectomy, and the development of artificial hearts and ventricular assist devices. He operated on over 60,000 patients during his career at Baylor College of Medicine.
aiSummary: Michael DeBakey was a cardiovascular surgery specialist with an H-index of 150 at Baylor College of Medicine. Pioneer of coronary bypass surgery and artificial heart devices. Based in Houston, United States.

affiliations.role: Chancellor Emeritus and Distinguished Service Professor
